2604.15114.title: Amortized Optimal Transport from Sliced Potentials
2604.15114.paper_summary: We propose a novel amortized optimization method for predicting optimal transport (OT) plans across multiple pairs of measures by leveraging Kantorovich potentials derived from sliced OT. We introduce two amortization strategies: regression-based amortization (RA-OT) and objective-based amortization (OA-OT). In RA-OT, we formulate a functional regression model that treats Kantorovich potentials from the original OT problem as responses and those obtained from sliced OT as predictors, and estimate these models via least-squares methods. In OA-OT, we estimate the parameters of the functional model by optimizing the Kantorovich dual objective. In both approaches, the predicted OT plan is subsequently recovered from the estimated potentials. As amortized OT methods, both RA-OT and OA-OT enable efficient solutions to repeated OT problems across different measure pairs by reusing information learned from prior instances to rapidly approximate new solutions. Moreover, by exploiting the structure provided by sliced OT, the proposed models are more parsimonious, independent of specific structures of the measures, such as the number of atoms in the discrete case, while achieving high accuracy. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approaches on tasks including MNIST digit transport, color transfer, supply-demand transportation on spherical data, and mini-batch OT conditional flow matching.
2604.15114.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一種新穎的攤銷優化方法，用於預測多對測量的最佳傳輸（OT）計劃，通過利用從切片 OT 中導出的 Kantorovich 潛力。我們引入了兩種攤銷策略：基於回歸的攤銷（RA-OT）和基於目標的攤銷（OA-OT）。在 RA-OT 中，我們構建了一個功能回歸模型，將原始 OT 問題中的 Kantorovich 潛力視為響應，將從切片 OT 獲得的潛力視為預測變數，並通過最小二乘法來估計這些模型。在 OA-OT 中，我們通過優化 Kantorovich 雙重目標來估計功能模型的參數。在這兩種方法中，預測的 OT 計劃隨後從估計的潛力中恢復。作為攤銷 OT 方法，RA-OT 和 OA-OT 都能通過重用從先前實例中學到的信息，快速近似新解，從而有效解決不同測量對之間的重複 OT 問題。此外，通過利用切片 OT 提供的結構，所提出的模型更加簡約，與測量的具體結構無關，例如在離散情況下的原子數，同時實現高準確性。我們在包括 MNIST 數字傳輸、顏色轉移、球面數據上的供需運輸以及小批量 OT 條件流匹配等任務上展示了我們方法的有效性。
2604.15114.author: Minh-Phuc Truong et.al.
